summary: Frontend testing complete for MSY Limo Service website redesign. All major features working: video background, animations, correct corporate image, 4 vehicles in fleet, FAQ accordion, service page animations, navigation, mobile responsiveness. Found one issue: homepage schema markup contains incorrect location data (Maryland/DC/VA instead of Louisiana).

issues: Schema markup at line 42-45 contains incorrect location data: 'addressRegion: MD' and 'areaServed: Maryland, Delaware, Northern Virginia' - should be Louisiana locations

passed_tests: Homepage hero section video background playing correctly
Homepage gold particles animation working (20 animated elements)
Homepage MSY LIMO SERVICE NEW ORLEANS branding displayed
Homepage booking widget iframe loaded
Corporate Transportation page displays correct executive/SUV image
Fleet page shows all 4 vehicles (Mercedes E-Class, S-Class, Cadillac Escalade, Mercedes Sprinter)
Fleet page vehicle cards have category badges (Business Class, First Class, Premium SUV, Sprinter Van)
About page correctly references New Orleans, Louisiana, Kenner, Metairie
About page NO Maryland/DC references in content
FAQ page loads with 8 accordion items
FAQ accordion expand/collapse animation working
Airport Transportation page loads with entrance animations
Wedding Limo Service page loads with entrance animations
Special Events page loads with entrance animations
Hourly Charter page loads with entrance animations
Navigation Services dropdown shows 5 services
Navigation Service Areas dropdown shows LA areas (New Orleans, Kenner, Metairie, Gretna)
Navigation links working (Fleet, About, FAQ, Contact)
Navigation Book Now button present
Mobile menu working on 390px viewport
Mobile responsiveness on Fleet page
No JavaScript errors on any page
All pages load without errors
action_items: FIX: Update HomePage.jsx lines 42-45 schema markup to use Louisiana location data instead of Maryland/DC/VA
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx schema markup has incorrect SEO data - 'addressRegion: MD' should be 'LA' and 'areaServed' should list Louisiana cities (New Orleans, Kenner, Metairie, etc.) instead of Maryland, Delaware, Virginia
context_for_next_testing_agent: Website fully redesigned with video background, animations via framer-motion, black/gold New Orleans theme. All service pages have entrance animations. Fleet page shows 4 vehicles. Schema markup in HomePage.jsx needs location data correction for SEO. Third-party booking widget from mylimobiz.com works correctly.
